Driving a hypercar off a massive cliff in Mexico while listening to classical music. Very relaxing driving simulator.
Tamed a high-level T-Rex after feeding it for hours. Then a glitch happened, and it instantly drowned in a puddle.
We wore clown masks, yelled at hostages to get on the ground, and the drill jammed for the fifth time in a row.
A naked crying baby shoots tears at literal poop monsters in a basement to escape his mother.
Attached balloons to enemy soldiers, sheep, and shipping containers so they fly into the sky. Excellent tactical espionage action.
Swung around New York City looking for backpacks for three hours instead of actually stopping the supervillains destroying the town.
Built a beautiful, thriving metropolis, then accidentally connected the sewage drain to the drinking water supply. Everyone is sick.
Said a ghost's name in the dark. The door locked, the flashlight flickered, and my friend screamed before disconnecting.
Got chased by angry hounds in the middle of winter, ran out of twigs, and died in the dark. Would suffer again.
A group of teens go to a snowy cabin. I tried to make the smart choices, but they all still died in horrible ways because I missed a button prompt.
Wandered around a foggy town fighting creepy mannequins because my dead wife sent me a letter. Extremely comforting.
A spiky-haired guy with a sword the size of a surfboard fights a corporation, but I spent all my time racing birds.
I failed to flip an egg perfectly, and a sweet lady got literal flames in her eyes. The pressure in this kitchen is immense.
A father throws his son into a volcano, so the son comes back to throw the father into a volcano. Normal family drama.
A fun board game that scientifically proves you don't actually like your friends when they steal your hard-earned star.
